A clear description of what the problem is.

## To reproduce

1. Run `ai-playbook ...`
2. Use agent `...`

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- AI tool: [e.g. Claude Code, Copilot, Kiro]

Paste relevant error output, agent responses, or screenshots.
